items.title: OpenAI rolls out tiered access to advanced AI cyber models
items.author: www.axios.com
items.snippet: As of April 2026, OpenAI has transitioned its model lineup to the GPT-5 series, retiring earlier models including GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, o3, and o4-mini from ChatGPT. The company has simplified its model picker to three primary tiers: Instant, Thinking, and Pro. GPT-5.3 Instant serves as the default model across all plans including free users, while GPT-5.4 (released March 5, 2026) is OpenAI's flagship frontier model with record benchmark scores on GDPval (83%) and computer-use benchmarks OSWorld-Veri

items.title: OpenAI Release Notes - April 2026 Latest Updates | Releasebot
items.author: releasebot.io
items.snippet:
OpenAI has been active on social media and in the news throughout April 2026, with several major announcements. The company closed a record-breaking $122 billion funding round and has surpassed $25 billion in annualized revenue, with enterprise revenue now accounting for over 40% of total revenue. OpenAI is also reportedly taking early steps toward a potential public listing as soon as late 2026, and will be included in ARK Invest ETFs.

On the product side, OpenAI released GPT-5.4, described as
